description: Rhyme-form training data — briefs, poems, rhyme-aware critiques

templates.brief:
Poetry request: "{user_request}"
Required form: {form_desc}

Write a generation brief (~200 tokens). Include:
- Angle: 2-3 sentences. Find the non-obvious entry point.
- Avoid: 3-4 specific clichéd phrases/images for this topic.
- Sensory anchor: 1 sentence. Name a concrete sense domain.
- Form: Restate the form, line count, and rhyme scheme. Name which lines must rhyme with which.

No rhetoric. No praise. Actionable only.
templates.poet:
Generation brief:

---
{brief}
---

Write the poem. Follow the form and rhyme scheme exactly — every paired line must end with a true phonetic rhyme. Output ONLY the poem, no commentary.
templates.poet_constrained:
You must end each line with the word shown. Do not rearrange, substitute, or skip any line.

{endword_block}

Brief:
---
{brief}
---

Write exactly {line_count} lines. Line N must end with the word assigned to Line N above. Output ONLY the poem.
